title: New Republic Ruling Council
content:

{{Quote|The great speed brake on the ship of state.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]]|<ref name="Shield of Lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>}}
The '''New Republic Ruling Council''' was the senior decision making body of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and was composed of the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] and and the [[Senator/Legends|senators]] that chaired each of the six [[Senate Council|sub-committees]] of the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]]. If a [[Vote of No Confidence/Legends|Vote of No Confidence]] was brought against the Chief of State, the council would review its legitimacy, then vote on whether or not the motion should be brought before the Senate. The Chief of State could bypass a vote by declaring a leave of absence and nominating one of the council to become caretaker Chief of State. It was the replacement of the [[New Republic Provisional Council]].

In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], the Ruling Council was replaced by the [[High Council (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance High Council]].

==Members of the Ruling Council in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]==
*[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]

==Members of the Ruling Council in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]==
*[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
*[[Behn-kihl-nahm]], Chair of the [[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Defense Council]]
*[[Doman Beruss (Illodian)|Doman Beruss]], Chair of the [[Ministry Council]]
*[[Dall Thara Dru]], Chair of the [[Commerce Council]]
*[[Borsk Fey'lya]], Chair of the [[Justice Council]]
*[[Krall Praget]], Chair of the [[Council on Security and Intelligence]]
*[[Rattagagech]], Chair of the [[Science and Technology Council]]
